text:

Page 1
P010 Rahul Sharma - MRN-2010
 Discharge Summary - Rahul Sharma
Demo only - not medical advice. Synthetic data only - no real PHI.
Encounter
Encounter date: 2019-03-18. Rahul Sharma, 52M in synthetic demo, established care after hyperglycemia noted
during admission for community-acquired pneumonia.
Assessment
Condition: Type 2 diabetes diagnosed in 2019-03. No diabetic complications documented at this encounter.
Medication Plan
Medication: Metformin 500 mg by mouth twice daily started 2019-03. Lifestyle counseling documented: diet,
exercise, smoking cessation.
Known Allergies
No known drug allergies documented in this 2019 discharge summary. Later records may supersede this.
